## Idea #1
**Name:** Blaze Wave
**Category:** Core Gameplay
**Subcategory:** Freeze Mechanics
**Rarity:** Uncommon
**Description:** A blaze wave mechanic that changes how freeze and rescue interactions work in matches.
**Gameplay Purpose:** Core gameplay mechanic for match flow
**Advantages:** Creates memorable gameplay moments
**Balancing Considerations:** Accessible to all skill levels
**Replayability Value:** Very High - different outcomes each match
**Suggested Visual Theme:** freeze mechanics themed core gameplay design
**Potential Seasonal Variations:** None
**Estimated Complexity:** Very High
**Long-Term Expansion Possibilities:** Tournament and esports integration
